closestEquivalent: Tiers (rooted, climbing, pruned) are simulated client-side via localStorage overrides and scope mapping (scope === 'archive' -> pruned).
Merge seedling displays AI dedupe advice and targets, then dismisses the seedling locally from the queue (local resolution; no file consolidation is executed).
Discard seedling dismisses the unmanaged scan path locally from the inbox triage queue since there is no server endpoint for deleting unmanaged files.
Undoing seedling Keep (adopt) is disabled because adoption deletes the original scan source file; archiving does not restore it.
Per-skill resident tokens are estimated client-side using a description character length heuristic (chars/4) to preview budget impact.
Skill exposure verdicts (active, stale, dormant) are derived client-side by joining registry skills with 30-day usage summary rows and recommendations.
